name: Mandi Karp, MurphyForFlorida.com
subject: disappointing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| When Patrick emailed you this morning, he told you that falling short on tonight's fundraising deadline is not an option.Friend -- When Patrick emailed you this morning, he told you that falling short on tonight's fundraising deadline is not an option. As this campaign's finance director, I want to inform you that as of 8:16pm, we're just 36 online donors away from crushing our 3,000 donation goal. That's astounding!!! If 36 of you step up before midnight, we can pull off a last minute comeback. If not, it will be a disappointing end to what could have been a great night. **This is your FINAL opportunity to be among the first 3,000 to support Patrick 's campaign. Will you chip in before midnight? ** _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ **[Chip in $5 immediately>>](http://act.murphyforflorida.
